further_reading.title: Accelerate Quicktour
further_reading.why_relevant: Grounds the practical mechanics of moving from single-device training to multi-GPU or multi-node launches.

further_reading.title: Schedule GPUs in Kubernetes
further_reading.why_relevant: Useful next reading for learners who want to understand how GPU resources are requested and scheduled once workloads move beyond a single box.

further_reading.title: Transformers bitsandbytes Quantization Guide
further_reading.why_relevant: Helps readers evaluate whether quantization and tighter memory discipline may remove a bottleneck before adding more GPUs.

notes: Module is mostly pedagogical guidance and decision framing; under the stated citation-density rules it contains no hard, specific factual claims that require inline citation.
